# CLAUDE.md

## Overview

The `tests/fixtures/ingest` directory stores ingest-edge-case fixtures and notes for discovery and normalization parity.

## Index

| File | Contents (WHAT) | Read When (WHEN) |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `CLAUDE.md` | Ingest-fixture directory index and task map | Finding discovery and normalization fixture assets |
| `README.md` | Ingest fixture scenarios and sanitization notes | Updating fixture coverage for parser edge cases |
| `mixed-events.jsonl` | Mixed valid, malformed, duplicate, and zero-token ingest sample | Reproducing ingest ordering, filtering, or dedupe behavior |
